element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic available from first encounter

element_introduction_order.element: Melee weapons (brass knuckles, steel pipes, trash cans)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Can be picked up from defeated enemies or found in environment

element_introduction_order.element: Gang members with distinct shirt colors
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each gang has unique characteristics and attack patterns to learn
Act as major difficulty checkpoints between neighborhoods
Permanent stat increases (Punch, Kick) purchasable with collected loot

element_introduction_order.element: Fighting technique books (Grand Slam, Stone Hands, Dragon Feet)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Unlockable special moves improving character effectiveness in battle
Generic Dudes, Frat Guys, Jocks, Squids, and others with escalating difficulty
Final confrontation with Slick to rescue Cyndi

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating gang members and collecting loot
Visiting shops to upgrade stats and healing
Purchasing food items and spa treatments
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering new gang types with distinct attack patterns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Open-world exploration rhythm with optional content interspersed between mandatory gang encounters; tension builds through gang progression (nine gangs total) with relief provided by frequent shop access and stat upgrades

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Shops and food vendors scattered throughout city signal areas for character advancement; exploration rewards stat progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Unused graphics suggest hidden mechanics were planned (Yamada telekinesis, character animations) indicating potential for secret areas, though not confirmed in final build

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat with Generic Dudes and basic gang encounters; shops provide immediate stat upgrade opportunities to mitigate difficulty
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive gang variety introduction (Frat Guys, Jocks, Squids); attack patterns become more distinctive; shop visits become strategic for stat optimization
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating gang boss difficulty; nine gangs total requiring mastery of fighting techniques; final approach to River City High with Slick confrontation
notable_spikes: Gang boss encounters serving as checkpoint difficulty gates
Introduction of new gang types with unique attack patterns
Final approach to River City High with accumulated enemy difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Open-world design allowing players to tackle gangs and areas in flexible order; breaks from traditional linear beat-em-up progression (similar to Renegade but with expanded world)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Overall city structure with nine gangs distributed across neighborhoods

notable_level_patterns.description: Nine distinct gangs function as territorial encounters with unique color-coded members; each gang has distinct characteristics and attack patterns; bosses mark neighborhood transitions
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic Dudes territory → Frat Guys territory → subsequent gang areas

notable_level_patterns.description: Shops scattered throughout enable stat upgrades and skill purchases; player must manage collected loot; permanent stat increases (Punch, Kick) create investment in exploration
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Food vendors and spa facilities interspersed between gang encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Ability to save character stats, skills, money, defeated bosses via password; enables non-linear playthrough and difficulty scaling based on prior progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Game-wide mechanic enabling flexible session management
